title: The Hippopotamus
content:
I shoot the Hippopotamus
    With bullets made of platinum,
    Because if I use leaden ones
    His hide is sure to flatten 'em.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Hilaire Belloc delivers a powerful performance in "The Hippopotamus"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
